pysoniq¶

Lightweight Pythonic cross-platform audio playback library.

Installation¶

pip install pysoniq

Usage¶

import pysoniq

API Reference¶

pysoniq

pysoniq - Lightweight cross-platform audio signal analysis and playback library

API Reference

  • pysoniq package
    • adjust_gain_level()
    • amplitude_to_db()
    • compress()
    • db_to_linear()
    • fft_frequencies()
    • frames_to_time()
    • get_gain()
    • get_volume_db()
    • is_looping()
    • is_paused()
    • limiter()
    • linear_to_db()
